extraction.one_line_summary: ZIMMERMANN Georg won with late counter-attack after BURGAUDEAU Mathieu went too early inside 500m on summit finish.
tactical_patterns: BURGAUDEAU took KOM points all day while appearing weak, then attacked 700m out revealing tactical deception.
14-rider break never settled due to continuous attacks, suggesting teams prioritized jersey points over cooperation.
ZIMMERMANN waited for BURGAUDEAU to commit first inside 500m, exploiting early acceleration on 2.3km summit finish.
VINGEGAARD accelerated with 1000m remaining, catching break remnants suggesting GC pacing errors by earlier leaders.

rider_signals.BURGAUDEAU Mathieu: positive: rode tactically weak all day to hide strength, secured KOM jersey and nearly won stage
rider_signals.ZIMMERMANN Georg: positive: first WorldTour win by reading BURGAUDEAU's premature acceleration perfectly inside 500m
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: accelerated late with O'Connor and Hindley, caught struggling break riders
rider_signals.GAUDU David: negative: struggling significantly after strong Pyrenees showing, illness affecting performance trajectory
rider_signals.GRONDIN Donavan: negative: abandoned race while holding mountains jersey, revealing multi-day weakness
